allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Mode, Name; Write-Output "---DOTNET---"; dotnet --version; Write-Output "---SDKS---"; dotnet --list-sdks)

PowerShell(wsl -e bash -lc "whoami; echo '---'; uname -a; echo '---'; cat /etc/os-release | head -3; echo '--- sudo ---'; sudo -n true 2>&1 && echo 'passwordless-sudo-OK' || echo 'sudo-needs-password'; echo '--- dotnet ---'; which dotnet || echo 'no-dotnet'; echo '--- mem ---'; free -h | head -2")

PowerShell(wsl -u root -e bash -lc "whoami; cat /etc/os-release | grep -E '^\(NAME|VERSION\)='; echo '--- arch/mem ---'; uname -m; free -h | head -2; echo '--- dotnet ---'; \(which dotnet && dotnet --version\) || echo 'no-dotnet'; echo '--- net ---'; cat /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null | head -1; echo '--- internet ---'; \(curl -sI https://packages.microsoft.com 2>/dev/null | head -1\) || echo 'curl-yok-veya-net-yok'")
Bash(git commit -q -m 'web: npm start takma adi ekle \(vite\) *)
